name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Breaking: The President's goals
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

Tonight was bittersweet. President Obama just delivered an incredibly inspiring State of the Union address, made all the more poignant by the fact that tonight was his seventh and final address.

As the President noted, we've made significant progress over the past few years, but there is no doubt we have more to accomplish. Tonight, we heard what the President's priorities are.

[**Friend -- what are yours? What progress would you most like to see in 2016? Click here and take our short survey to let us know.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2241/738133e4/3b4997f4/7f838d97/990057395/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160112b")

President Obama laid out his vision for America's future. But he's only going to be here for another year. **It 's up to us to look through 2016 and beyond.**

It's no secret Republicans in Congress have stalled progress on issues that affect Americans and Florida families -- especially in regards to gun safety. But that doesn't mean we stop trying -- __it means we try even harder.__

[**Take the short survey and let me know what you want to see Congress working on in 2016 and beyond.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2241/738133e4/3b4997f4/7f838d97/990057395/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160112b")

If we all stand together, we can get a compromise and move forward. Thanks for your input!

Patrick Murphy

name: Rick Tyler
subject: #CruzCrew Daily Briefing
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Dear Friend,

Yesterday, President Obama addressed the nation in his final
State of the Union. See Ted Cruz's response below:

"The President
continues to be in denial of reality. He would have us believe
that global warming is our greatest threat, our military is as
strong as it can be, the economy is working for American
families, and that the key to alleviating poverty is more
government dependence.

"The reality is very
different. We have had at least eight ISIS inspired attacks on
innocent Americans, including law enforcement, yet Obama refuses
to acknowledge the root of the cause of these attacks, radical
Islamic terrorism.... And while Obama lectured us on civility, he
neglected to pay tribute to the 10 American sailors who were
taken hostage by Iran that very day. Instead, he praised the Iran
deal and no less than three times professed the threat of climate
change.

"Obama's final State
of the Union address marks the end of eight years of lost
potential for America that will fortunately soon come to a
close…. And it's a signal that Americans are ready to
stand together to elect a leader who will bring back jobs and
growth, champion every citizens' God-given liberties, and restore
our security and our leadership in the world."

Best,

Rick Tyler
Communications
Director

name: Ryan Rhodes
subject: Can we add your name to Dr. Carson's list?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32844685:suZfZtyNw:m:1:876315805:39DD91C4544ABEDEDEF58243EB9591A0:r)
---

Peter,

My name is Ryan Rhodes and I am the Iowa State Director for Dr. Carson.

**The Iowa Caucuses on February 1st are less than 3 weeks away. At that point, the process of choosing our next President will be officially underway.**

Dr. Carson is spending over half the month here in Iowa, and everywhere we go he's been greeted with incredible enthusiasm and overflow crowds. Don't believe the liberal media, momentum is coming at just the right time.

**But we have an enormous amount of grassroots work to do, and you are an integral part of our strategy for victory. Let me explain...

**Over the past few months, we've identified 100,000 Iowans most likely to support Dr. Carson, and if we can recruit roughly 37,000 of them, **we will win on February 1st.**

**To help, w****e've hired a 65-person IOWA STRIKE FORCE** responsible for recruiting, training and deploying teams of volunteers that will be knocking on doors, making phone calls, and convincing Iowans to caucus for me. And then they'll be following up with more calls and visits.
**Here's where you come in...

[We need you to make an urgent grassroots donation to get our Iowa Strike Force the support they need. Before Thursday's 9pm ET Fox Business debate, the campaign will be showing Ben a list of everyone who helped and I want to ensure your name is included.

And for a donation of $25 or more, we'll even send you a copy of Ben's short, easy-to-read book, _My Life_.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32844685:suZfZtyNw:m:1:876315805:39DD91C4544ABEDEDEF58243EB9591A0:r)
**
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32844685:suZfZtyNw:m:1:876315805:39DD91C4544ABEDEDEF58243EB9591A0:r)
---
Peter, we must win in Iowa. When we do, we'll build momentum to take us to New Hampshire, South Carolina, Nevada and beyond. We will prove that the American people are yearning and ready to reclaim power from the professional political class.

**We've built a movement of millions. Now it's time to show what we can do. Now is the time when it really counts.**

America was supposed to be a land of citizen-statesmen. Government wasn't meant to be involved in every aspect of our lives.

Ben is running for President because he is concerned about the future we are leaving our children and grandchildren, and I believe that he can get us back on the right track.

**[If, like me, you believe in Ben and his vision for a more hopeful America, I ask you to dig deep and donate to support our Iowa Strike Force now. We cannot do this without you.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32844685:suZfZtyNw:m:1:876315805:39DD91C4544ABEDEDEF58243EB9591A0:r)

**Thank you, and God Bless America.

Sincerely,

Ryan Rhodes
Iowa State Director
Ben Carson for President

name: Doug Stafford
subject: Here's the proof
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

This morning a Des Moines Register poll
showed what we've been saying all along.

Rand is in 5th place and rising in Iowa. He
is ahead of Bush, Christie and Kasich.

He belongs in the main debate by the media's
own criteria.

It would be an outrage to continue to keep
him out.
Even Politico is admitting, it was only bad
timing pushed Rand out of Thursday night's debate.
"Fox Business had said last month that the
top six candidates in the five most recent national polls as of
Monday evening would make the main stage, joined by any other
candidates who appeared in the top five in either Iowa or New
Hampshire - the two states that vote first in the nominating
process. Paul was in seventh place in all three averages,
according to POLITICO's calculations.
But a new Des Moines Register/Bloomberg
Politics poll in Iowa released Wednesday morning has Paul at 5
percent - alone in fifth place."
We deserve to be on stage.
We have over 1,000 precinct captains in Iowa
and a huge 500 person leadership team in New Hampshire.
Rand spoke with packed crowds in overflowing
rooms, just this week.
He's on the ballot in every state.
This is a top tier campaign in every way,
including the polls.
Any effort to prevent Rand from speaking on
the mainstage at the next debate is misguided, ridiculous, and
just flat out wrong.
They've been trying to block out our message
of liberty this whole time -- but we can't let them win.
They need to hear from us, loud and clear:
The liberty movement will not be silenced.
Stand with Rand today. Show the media: We
know you're wrong, and we won't let you get away with it.

In Liberty,
Doug Stafford

| Hi Friend,

I just wanted to quickly connect because your name came up again when we were reviewing some notes about prospective Cruz Team members.

Would you be interested in being the newest Cruz for President Team member?

_Ted is hoping you will join before[ tomorrow night's ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32849993:W9lM0tyNw:m:1:1104269936:7BEE81055B85FBD8A93335656DF33F75:r)debate._

Katie McGinty

name: Rand Paul
subject: Can they argue with this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

With tomorrow night's debate rapidly
approaching, even some in the media are now saying I deserve to
be on the main stage.

This morning's Des Moines Register/Bloomberg
Politics poll had me squarely in fifth place.

As Politico states, that poll "gets Paul into
a tie for fifth place with former Florida Gov. Jeb Bush . . .
That, presumably, would get Paul onto the main stage."

Just based on his last name, they'd never
think of barring Jeb Bush from the main stage. But they're quick
to do everything they can to stop people from hearing my message
of liberty!

Patriot, as I've stated time and again, my
campaign is growing. The most recent polling shows my numbers
rising -- at just the right time.

So the question is, will you and I allow the
media to black out my message?

Or will you stand with me as I take the fight
for liberty to Iowa and New Hampshire with your most generous
contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away?

Despite a national media who is ridiculously
biased against the principles of liberty that you and I hold
dear, my campaign has been top tier from the very beginning.

We've raised over $25 million. I'm on the
ballot in all 50 states. I have a 500-member leadership team in
New Hampshire, and just last week we announced 1,000 precinct
captains in Iowa.

Many of those figures other campaigns could
only dream about.

Yet, the media has been working overtime to
kill my campaign since the early fall, just like the media and
party insiders slammed the door in the face of my dad's
supporters in 2012.

It hasn't worked. Grassroots support for
liberty cannot be stopped.

And you can rest assured I'll point out the
egg on their faces with every new poll that comes out showing my
campaign gaining momentum.

But I'm counting on your support.

Please agree to your most generous
contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away to help show our
national media that you won't be letting them decide this
election.

It's just too important.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

Chip in $25 >>

Chip in $50 >>

Chip in $75 >>

Chip in $100 >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

subject: Did you see Drudge Report this morning?
body:
Friend -- a couple of things:
* Last week, a poll showed Jeb in 2nd place in New Hampshire.
* **Now Drudge is reporting that Jeb is 3rd place nationally -- beating Carson, Rubio, Kasich, Christie, Fiorina and Paul.**

With only 19 days until voting starts, momentum is growing and they're worried, Friend. Jeb's gaining, which means the knives will come out. To be frank, we're already seeing it, and we need to defend Jeb.**That 's why we need to raise $50,000 before the debate tomorrow.**

name: Keep the Promise I
subject: Thank you for registering!
body:
Welcome! Thank you for signing up for the latest updates regarding Keep thePromise I. We are happy to have you on board and look forward to communicating with you throughout the 2016 presidential campaign.
This could be the most important election in our nation’s history. The United States is standing at the proverbial fork in the road - either we go in the direction of small government and freedom or we move towards a more oppressive society, one that our forefathers would be ashamed to call America.We believe the best candidate to take this country back to its roots - and towards a more secure, more prosperous future - is Senator Ted Cruz. A proven leader and winner, Senator Cruz knows what it’s like to overcome obstacles. He knows what it’s like to fight for what you believe in - and win. And he knows what it’s like to be the only one standing up to leaders in both parties - and the “business as usual” cartel in Washington - to protect and advance the freedom for all Americans.

Keep the Promise I is planning to communicate with you and your fellow Americans in many different ways. To engage in a two-way conversation about the future of our great nation, we will be airing radio, digital and TV ads and interacting on social media platforms plus mail and email. With your prayers, and with your help, we will be a driving force behind Senator Ted Cruz and let the country know that he is indeed the best candidate for the job of President of the United States.

Thank you for your support and we look forward to communicating with you throughout these coming months! To support Keep the Promise I financially and help get our message about Ted Cruz to a wider audience, go here.

body:
We're down in the Iowa polls. | Friend --

There are not one, but _two_ new public polls out this week that have us down in Iowa.

Now, you should always take public polling with a grain of salt. But if you thought this race wasn't going to be close, well, it is. This isn't me claiming the sky is falling -- these are just the facts.

Voters will caucus in Iowa in 19 days, and the Sanders campaign is outspending us on TV. It's going to take everyone on this team to stand together and show what a strong organization we've built. We can and will win this nomination if we keep our heads down and stay focused on what matters: the people counting on us and on Hillary.

**Hillary's been fighting for families for decades -- if you're with her, this is the time to show it. It's not about the money. It's about digging deep and doing what it takes so we can make a difference for this country. Chip in $1 now, and let’s go win this thing:**

clean_body: We're down in the Iowa polls. | Friend -- There are not one, but two new public polls out this week that have us down in Iowa. Now, you should always take public polling with a grain of salt. But if you thought this race wasn't going to be close, well, it is. This isn't me claiming the sky is falling -- these are just the facts. Voters will caucus in Iowa in 19 days, and the Sanders campaign is outspending us on TV. It's going to take everyone on this team to stand together and show what a strong organization we've built. We can and will win this nomination if we keep our heads down and stay focused on what matters: the people counting on us and on Hillary. Hillary's been fighting for families for decades -- if you're with her, this is the time to show it. It's not about the money. It's about digging deep and doing what it takes so we can make a difference for this country.
